commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Discord chunking/retry, Feishu bitable metadata, Telegram message-cache hydration, apply-patch heredoc parsing, onboarding auth-choice handling, config rejected-write logging, and gateway chat-display projection.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence real runtime reproduction is available for the PR's claimed bugs. Source inspection does provide a clear regression path for the Telegram cache read: an existing but unreadable, raced, or directory cache path would now throw before the per-line catch.
commands.review_followup: Contributor/human follow-up is needed to fix the Telegram regression and add after-fix real behavior proof before maintainers can evaluate the broad batch.
